title: Force Therapeutics - Orthopedic Episode Management
problem: Orthopedic patients need guidance through pre-habilitation, surgery, and rehabilitation, but practices lack resources to provide continuous support.
solution: Digital care management platform for orthopedic episodes with patient engagement, remote monitoring, and outcomes tracking throughout the surgical journey.
technology: Mobile app, care pathways, remote monitoring, outcomes analytics, video education
target_customer: Orthopedic practices, hospitals, health systems, bundled payment programs
regulatory_notes: HIPAA compliant, no FDA clearance needed
varden_fit: VERY HIGH - Episode-based care coordination is perfect fit for Varden. Orthopedics is high-volume specialty with clear care pathways.
notes: Category leader in orthopedic episode management. Strong value-based care alignment.
